name: GitHub Actions
description: The GitHub Actions status of the branch a session is working in, shown in that session's header: a coloured dot (green pass, red fail, amber running) for the latest workflow run on the current branch, with the workflow, event and time on hover — click to open the run on GitHub. Completes the GitHub set alongside Issues, Pull Requests and Git status. Uses your existing gh CLI login (no token to paste); requires the GitHub CLI installed and authenticated.
author: Cockpit
